description: The deterministic phase spine for the Signature Funnel. Each P-phase names its produces_artifact, its thin _chk_sf_* preflight wrapper (DEFERS unless funnel_type == signature_funnel), and its fail-closed gate. The orchestrator run_signature_funnel.py runs this spine IN ORDER with no skips (front-door nonce required) and issues the signed PROCESS-CERTIFICATE only on all-phases-pass. Image gen delegates to Skill 47 (kie_image.py); ALL GHL media + build delegate to Skill 6 (ghl_media.py / ghl_rest_canvas.py). CLIENT runtime uses the client's OWN providers, never Anthropic.

front_door.nonce: the run-scoped 0600 nonce keys the certificate HMAC; a direct orchestrator call without it dies AF-FUN-FRONT-DOOR
front_door.rule: NOTHING generates copy/prompts, calls Kie, touches GHL, or mints a certificate except THROUGH signature-funnel-entry.sh.

phases.name: Image generation (DELEGATED to Skill 47)
phases.gate: provenance enforced at P9 (Kie taskId + GHL host)

phases.name: GHL media folder + upload (DELEGATED to Skill 6)
Per-page HTML fragment assembly
phases.gate: run_signature_funnel._gate_html_fragments (non-empty fragment per matrix profile; fail-closed)

phases.name: GHL funnel/page build (DELEGATED to Skill 6)
phases.gate: prove_sf_build.py (funnel-build QC >= 8.5 + non-empty preview URL per page; fail-closed)

phases.name: Derived pages loop (U1/D1/U2/D2/TY)
phases.gate: run_signature_funnel._gate_derived_pages (derived set == matrix; U1/D1/U2/D2/TY labels; fail-closed)

phases.name: Optional 10 promo emails (handoff)
phases.gate: out of scope for Skill 49 (hand off brief + copy, receive 10 emails)

chk_wrappers.note: Thin (<=6-line) preflight wrappers appended to the orchestrator's PREFLIGHT_REQUIRED; each DEFERS (returns OK) unless the run's funnel_type == signature_funnel, then shells its prover.

delegation_seams.client_provider_rule: CLIENT runtime tiers the client's OWN configured providers (strongest -> copy+QC; mid -> prompts/HTML/JSON; cheapest -> catalog/poll). NEVER Anthropic on a client box.

AF-FUN-INTAKE-MISSING.trigger: a required intake answer (by funnel size) is missing/empty

AF-FUN-INTAKE-TRUTHGATE.trigger: community URL / bonus / founder-text not confirmed (Q16)

AF-FUN-PROFILE-UNKNOWN.trigger: page_type not in the profiles map

AF-FUN-SECTION-MISSING.trigger: a required section for the page profile is absent

AF-FUN-SECTION-EXTRA.trigger: a page carries a section not allowed by its profile

AF-FUN-SECTION-ORDER.trigger: sections duplicated / not ascending / bad id

AF-FUN-SEC1-TITLE.trigger: Section 1 does not contain the product title

AF-FUN-PAIN-QUESTION.trigger: a pain section is written in question format ('?')

AF-FUN-PAIN-2ND-PERSON.trigger: a pain section is not in 2nd person (no you/your)

AF-FUN-PAIN-CTA.trigger: a pain section missing a labeled CTA

AF-FUN-SEC5-LEAD.trigger: Section 5 does not start 'That's the reason why...'

AF-FUN-BENEFIT-NO-CTA.trigger: a benefit section (8/9) carries a CTA (forbidden)

AF-FUN-SEC10-CTA.trigger: Section 10 missing its inspirational CTA button

AF-FUN-SEC12-STRUGGLE.trigger: Section 12 part 2 does not start 'I used to be just like you...'

AF-FUN-SEC8REPL-NAME.trigger: replacement Section 8 name mismatches the profile

AF-FUN-TY1-TITLE.trigger: Thank-You TY-1 does not name the product title

AF-FUN-TY2-STEPBAND.trigger: a Thank-You TY-2 step outside 89-116 chars

AF-FUN-PROMPT-NEGATIVE.trigger: no negative block ('Do not ...') in the prompt

AF-FUN-PROMPT-TYPO.trigger: text-bearing prompt lacks spelling-lock/words, or non-text prompt lacks 'no text'

AF-FUN-HTML-FRAGMENT.trigger: a pages/<profile>.fragment.html is missing/empty for a matrix page

AF-FUN-GRAPH-NODES.trigger: node id set does not match the MASTERDOC §3 matrix for the size

AF-FUN-GRAPH-EDGE.trigger: an edge references an unknown node or carries an illegal on-label

AF-FUN-GRAPH-TERMINAL.trigger: thank-you is not the unique terminal, or a non-terminal node is a dead end

AF-FUN-GRAPH-BRANCH.trigger: an upsell node is missing its accept or decline (one-click) edge

AF-FUN-GRAPH-REACH.trigger: a node is unreachable from main, or cannot reach thank-you

AF-FUN-BUILD-MALFORMED.trigger: build_receipt.json absent/unreadable or carries no pages (fail-closed)

AF-FUN-BUILD-QC.trigger: build receipt qc_score missing/non-numeric or below the 8.5 floor

AF-FUN-BUILD-PREVIEW.trigger: a built page has no non-empty http(s) preview_url

AF-FUN-DERIVE-LEDGER.trigger: derived_pages.json absent/malformed, wrong derived set, or bad U1/D1/U2/D2/TY label

AF-FUN-TY-PITCH.trigger: an offer/product NAME appears on the thank-you page

AF-FUN-TY-PRICE.trigger: a price/monetary token appears on the thank-you page

AF-FUN-TY-CTA.trigger: a sale/offer CTA (non-utility) on the thank-you page

AF-FUN-IMG-HOST.trigger: media URL does not resolve to a GHL media host

AF-FUN-OFFER-LEDGER-MISSING.trigger: no offer names to prove absent (fail-closed)

AF-FUN-TY-MISSING.trigger: no thank-you page (cannot prove no-pitch; fail-closed)

AF-FUN-IMG-EMPTY.trigger: no image records (cannot prove provenance; fail-closed)

AF-FUN-CERT-PHASE-GAP.trigger: phase orders not contiguous 0..N (a phase skipped)

AF-FUN-CERT-PHASE-FAIL.trigger: a phase status != pass / all_phases_pass not true

AF-FUN-CERT-SIGNATURE.trigger: HMAC signature invalid for the nonce (tamper/forgery)

AF-FUN-PROCESS-INTEGRITY.trigger: process certificate invalid -> funnel is NOT done

AF-FUN-FRONT-DOOR.trigger: orchestrator called without the run-scoped front-door nonce

AF-FUN-CANONICAL-BYPASS.trigger: run working files hand-roll GHL REST / mail sender / raw Kie createTask

AF-FUN-HASH-PIN.trigger: enforcement-core sha256 does not match SF-PROVER-PIN.sha256

AF-FUN-INTAKE-PERSONA-LOG.trigger: persona-selection-log absent or names no registered persona slug (copywriter-persona Step-0 grounding); FIX-XC-02a fail-closed

AF-FUN-MODEL-TIER.trigger: model-content-receipt absent or authoring tier is not an execution/content tier (client's own strongest model must write copy); FIX-XC-09e

AF-FUN-MODEL-NOANTHROPIC.trigger: authoring model provider is Anthropic/Claude (client skills never use Anthropic); FIX-XC-09e
